[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000100 1
1 11000101 4
2 10100110 4
3 00000000 a
4 10011111 6
5 01011111 6
6 00110011 4
7 01000010 2

01 10 00011111 5
12 21 00010011 3
23 32 00000010 1
34 43 00000000 a match 3
45 54 00000100 1 match 0
56 65 00000100 1 match 0
67 76 10000100 2
70 07 10000110 3

02 20 00010011 3
13 31 01000010 2 match 7
24 42 00000001 1
35 53 00000000 a match 3
46 64 00000101 2
57 75 00000100 1 match 0
60 06 10000101 3
71 17 00000110 2

03 30 00000010 1
14 41 00000101 2
25 52 00000000 a match 3
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 00000100 1 match 0
50 05 00000100 1 match 0
61 16 01000101 3
72 27 00100010 2

04 40 00000101 2
15 51 00000100 1 match 0
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 00000010 1
